headline: Will New Custom AI Chips Propel Meta Platforms to $750?
summary: Meta Platforms (NASDAQ:META) unveiled four new in-house AI chips today, a move that reads like a declaration of infrastructure independence. Yet, META stock was flat to slightly red in Wednesday trading as the market digested the announcement. The Meta Platforms share price has gone essentially nowhere year-to-date, down less than 1% since January 1. This ... Will New Custom AI Chips Propel Meta Platforms to $750?
